---
title: "Valentina Zangirolami"
subtitle: "PhD Student in Statistics at University of Milano-Bicocca"
page-layout: full
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 8em
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - icon: journal-text
      text: "Curriculum vitae"
      href: /files/cv_zangirolami.pdf
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: "Email address"
      href: "mailto: valentina.zangirolami@unimib.it"
    - icon: github
      text: "Github"
      href: https://github.com/ValentinaZangirolami
    - icon: linkedin
      text: "Linkedin"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/valentinazangirolami/
---

## About me {.central}

I am a PhD student in Statistics at [Department of Economics, Management and Statistics]{style="color: palevioletred; font-weight: bold;"} of [University of Milano-Bicocca]{style="color: palevioletred; font-weight: bold;"}. I currently live in Italy.

**Research interests**: Reinforcement Learning, Applied Statistics, Statistical Inference

**E-mail**: valentina.zangirolami\@gmail.com

::: {.research-box}
### Research overview
My research lies at the intersection of reinforcement learning and statistics, with a focus on partial observability and feedback-driven adaptation. In particular, I study questions of statistical inference and robustness in sequential learning problems, and I am currently exploring applications in autonomous driving and water tank control systems.
:::
